creator: cs891277@csie.ncu.edu.tw
text:
php5-mysqli-5.2.6 make build error my machine (FreeBSD 6.3-STABLE amd64)
but it's OK on other two machines
(FreeBSD 6.3-STABLE i386)&(FreeBSD  5.5-STABLE i386)
